caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Swells Impact Grand Cayman
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing east-southeast swells with seas up to 6.8 ft, 17 kt east winds and a 7 s dominant swell period, and an 88% rain probability at the port. I note Roatan is the runner-up port with sustained easterly winds up to 27 kt, producing choppy seas and intermittent heavy downpours in embedded squalls; mariners should prepare for brief reductions in visibility and gusty squalls.

mediterranean.headline: Light Winds, Moderate Seas Across Mediterranean
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is seeing northeast winds to 19 kt with seas to 4.9 ft and an NNE dominant swell at 5 s, with less than 10% rain probability. Cadiz is lighter at 14 kt, and I expect conditions to remain benign for routine marine and port operations today.
